summary: Iteration 29: Provider Images Feature Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: POST/GET/PUT provider catalog with 'images' array field, POST upload/image for provider role, GET pdf-status with page progress. Frontend: Portrait product cards (aspect-[3/4]), image carousel with arrows/dots, multi-image upload dialog (up to 10 photos), photo count badges.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/provider/catalog accepts 'images' array field and stores it
Backend: GET /api/provider/catalog returns products with 'images' field
Backend: POST /api/upload/image works for provider role
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/pdf-status/{task_id} returns current_page and total_pages fields
Backend: Create product with empty images array works
Backend: Add images to existing product works
Frontend: Provider product cards are in portrait format (aspect-[3/4])
Frontend: Product dialog has 'PHOTOS DU PRODUIT (0/10)' label
Frontend: Product dialog has 'Ajouter des photos' button for multi-image upload
Frontend: Product dialog shows 'Jusqu'à 10 photos' limit message
Frontend: Product cards show '2 photos' / '3 photos' badge when multiple images exist
Frontend: Image carousel has left/right navigation arrows on hover
Frontend: Image carousel has dot indicators at bottom
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified all provider images features. Backend: provider.py lines 27-68 handles images array in create/update/get. uploads.py line 60 allows 'provider' role. toptex_import.py lines 243-247 returns current_page/total_pages. Frontend: ProviderDashboard.js lines 331-364 show portrait cards with carousel, lines 908-931 show multi-image upload dialog. Test products 'Test Multi Photos' (2 photos) and 'T-Shirt Sport Test Multi-Photos' (3 photos) exist with multiple images.

backend_provider_upload.verified: provider role can upload images via POST /api/upload/image
